Best Vaporisers for UK Medical Cannabis Patients (2026): The 5 That Actually Deliver

From the clinic-grade Mighty+ to the budget-friendly XMAX V3 Pro, we tested the five dry-herb vaporisers that UK patients actually rate. Not a single conduction pen made the cut.

18 JUNE 2026 · 9 MIN READ ·UK

City Guide

Medical Cannabis in Birmingham (2026): Clinics, Eligibility & What Patients Should Know

Birmingham is the UK's second city, and its residents have full access to every UK cannabis clinic. Here is how the system works, which clinics serve the Midlands, and what your first step should be.

18 JUNE 2026 · By TGC · 3 min read
City Guide

Medical Cannabis in London (2026): Clinics, Eligibility & What Patients Should Know

London has more prescribing clinics than anywhere else in the UK — but most Londoners still do not know medical cannabis is legal. Here is how the system works in the capital, which clinics serve London patients, and what your first step should be.

18 JUNE 2026 · By TGC · 6 min read
City Guide

Medical Cannabis in Manchester (2026): Clinics, Eligibility & What Patients Should Know

Manchester patients can access every UK cannabis clinic via video consultation — no travel required. Here is how the system works, which clinics best serve the North West, and what your first step should be.

18 JUNE 2026 · By TGC · 4 min read

Europe, USA & Global

All World
Europe

Europe Turns Green: How EU Cannabis Reform Momentum Is Reshaping the Continent

From German pilot programmes to Czech legalisation and French medical trials, European cannabis reform is accelerating. We examine the patchwork of policies reshaping access across the continent.

17 JUNE 2026 · By TGC · 5 min read
Conference

Cannabis Europa 2026: The Continent Accelerates as the UK Stands Still

At Cannabis Europa London 2026, held in May, delegates confronted a stark divide: the EU races toward regulatory harmonisation and adult-use reform, while the UK remains mired in a stalled medical programme. Investment is flowing east, and the conversation has shifted from ‘if’ to ‘when’ for adult-use in countries like the Czech Republic and the Netherlands.

28 MAY 2026 · By TGC · 4 min read
USA

Green Gold Rush: US Medical Cannabis Market on Track to Surpass $45 Billion by 2027, Q1 2026 Report Reveals

Q1 2026 data projects US medical cannabis market to exceed $45 billion by 2027, with record sales but price compression squeezing multi-state operators in mature western states.

15 MAY 2026 · By TGC · 3 min read
PATIENT ACCESS

Could you qualify for medical cannabis?

Medical cannabis has been legal in the UK since 2018. Most patients don't know it's an option. Take the two-minute checker to find out how the system works and whether you match the profile clinics assess.

Check your eligibility

Medical disclaimer: The Ganja Club is an informational publication, not a medical provider. Nothing on this site constitutes medical advice. Always consult a GMC-registered specialist. Medical cannabis has been legal on prescription in the UK since November 2018.
